title: Cli Option Groups
description: Reusable CLI option-group manifest used by generated command metadata.

items.description: One entry in the uses list.

uses.description: Ordered uses entries used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the options list.

options.description: Ordered options entries used by this contract.

additionalProperties.description: Named entry in the option groups mapping.

option_groups.description: Option groups details used by this contract.

name.description: Human-readable or lookup name for this entry.

items.description: One entry in the flags list.

flags.description: Ordered flags entries used by this contract.

action.description: Action text value used by this contract.

items.description: One entry in the choices list.

choices.description: Ordered choices entries used by this contract.

choices_ref.description: Choices ref text value used by this contract.

default_ref.description: Default ref text value used by this contract.

type.description: Category used to choose validation, rendering, or routing behavior.

required.description: Required true/false policy flag used by this contract.

help.description: Help text value used by this contract.

help_template.description: Help template text value used by this contract.

option.description: Option details used by this contract.
